CustomField.description: Set to true by coordinator when the climate change assessment section is complete and incorporated into the EA or EIS. Clears the NEPA_Phase2_Climate_Gate validation rule, allowing advancement to Decision stage. Required before FONSI or ROD issuance when Climate_Assessment_Required__c = true.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check when climate assessment is complete and incorporated into the NEPA document. Required to advance to Decision when Phase 2 applies.
CustomField.label: Climate Assessment Complete
